title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV. LOUISIANA KIDNEY HEALTH CARE LAW

§1217.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Kidney Health Care Law".

            Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.81 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART IV.  LOUISIANA KIDNEY HEALTH CARE LAW
§1217.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Kidney Health Care
Law".
Acts 1995, No. 951, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.81 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
